slides.title: Day 5 — Week 1 Commitment Day
slides.body:
Five days ago you heard three stories.
You built identity, discovered industry and customer, drafted your canvas.

Today: present, commit, and launch Week 2.
discussionQuestions: What are you most proud of from Week 1?

slides.title: 3-Year Vision Review
slides.body:
Future self · Ambition · Impact · Career direction.

Your presentation must show coherence — one venture story.
discussionQuestions: Does your portfolio tell one story?

slides.title: Opportunity Mapping
slides.body:
Connect persona problems → canvas priorities → Week 2 research.

Venture entrepreneurs show evidence, not hope.

slides.title: Hour 200 Venture Board Preview
slides.body:
Segment 1 ends at Hour 200 Venture Board.
Week 1 is foundation — not the finish line.

Today's presentation is practice for that gate.
discussionQuestions: What will Hour 200 look like for you?

slides.title: Deck 01 Close
slides.body: Deck 02: presentation protocol and coaching summary.
discussionQuestions: Who presents first from your squad?
